subject:
Re: Why is the MCore reconstruction "much" better than
 relion_reconstruct?
body:
Sorry, the missing --ctf was when I edited the email. It was used to 
reconstruct the half map2.
The maps look reasonable even without --3d_rot, I will re-run with --3d_rot.
Simon



On Monday, November 18, 2024 at 1:56:32 PM UTC-5 alist...@gmail.com wrote:

> it also looks like you didn't apply the ctf to your second subset...
>
> On Mon, 18 Nov 2024 at 10:55, Alister Burt <alist...@gmail.com> wrote:
>
>> and yes, --ctf is correct
>>
>> On Mon, 18 Nov 2024 at 10:55, Alister Burt <alist...@gmail.com> wrote:
>>
>>> Hi Simon,
>>>
>>> Broadly yes, the M reconstruction is doing a few things that are not 
>>> taken into account by the Warp particle export tool
>>> - temporal resolution of particle poses
>>> - per-image/per-tilt series weights
>>>
>>> You should also add `--3d_rot` to your relion_reconstruct command - do 
>>> your maps look reasonable without it?
>>>
>>> Cheers,
>>>
>>> Alister
>>>
>>> On Mon, 18 Nov 2024 at 10:13, Simon Jenni <je...@crystal.harvard.edu> 
>>> wrote:
>>>
>>>> My MCore reconstruction is at 3.47 A. I then export 3D particles and 
>>>> CTF volume and use relion_reconstruct to calculate half maps (no 
>>>> refinement). The resolution drops to 4.18. Is this expected, because 
>>>> WarpTools ts_export_particles is not exporting everything of the MCore 
>>>> optimization? Or is there some weighting in the MCore reconstruction that 
>>>> cannot be exported? Is just --ctf the correct relion_reconstruct option in 
>>>> this situation?
>>>>
>>>> Thanks, Simon
>>>>
>>>> MCore reconstruction, C1 symmetry
>>>> resolution (from MCore half maps) = 3.47
>>>>
>>>> export 3D particles and 3D CTF with WarpTools ts_export_particles
>>>>
>>>> relion_reconstruct --i partilces.star --subset 1 \
>>>> --o rec_half_map1.mrc \
>>>> --sym C1 \
>>>> --ctf --pad 2
>>>>
>>>> relion_reconstruct --i partilces.star --subset 2 \
>>>> --o rec_half_map2.mrc \
>>>> --sym C1 \
>>>>  --pad 2
>>>>
>>>> resolution (from relion_reconstruct half maps) = 4.18
>>>>
>>>> -- 
>>>> You received this message because you are subscribed to the Google 
>>>> Groups "Warp" group.
>>>> To unsubscribe from this group and stop receiving emails from it, send 
>>>> an email to warp-em+u...@googlegroups.com.
>>>> To view this discussion visit 
>>>> https://groups.google.com/d/msgid/warp-em/bd2e7e5a-3766-4af0-9a45-c67eff539479n%40googlegroups.com 
>>>> <https://groups.google.com/d/msgid/warp-em/bd2e7e5a-3766-4af0-9a45-c67eff539479n%40googlegroups.com?utm_medium=email&utm_source=footer>
>>>> .
>>>>
>>>
